name: CTC Optimizer
metaTitle: CTC Optimizer — Maximize Your In-Hand Salary | Financial Simulators
metaDescription: See how much of your CTC you actually take home. Optimize salary structure for maximum in-hand pay. Client-side, no PII.

faq.question: How much of my CTC do I actually get?
faq.answer: A ₹15L CTC typically gives ₹9.5-11L in hand depending on your salary structure. EPF, gratuity, and taxes take 27-37% off the top. This calculator shows the exact breakdown.

faq.question: How can I optimize my CTC structure?
faq.answer: Restructuring allowances (HRA, transport, food) can increase in-hand pay without changing your CTC. Some companies allow flexible benefit plans that reduce your tax burden.
